headline: 2 Mega-Cap Stocks with Impressive Fundamentals and 1 We Turn Down
summary: “Too big to fail” is how we would describe the megacap stocks in this article today. While they will likely stand the test of time, it’s not all sunshine and rainbows as their scale can limit their ability to find new sources of growth.

headline: EPAA and HSBC launch APAC working group on agentic payments
summary: EPAA said there is currently no “agreed standard” across APAC on who is liable when an AI agent exceeds its mandate.

raw.headline: EPAA and HSBC launch APAC working group on agentic payments
raw.summary: EPAA said there is currently no “agreed standard” across APAC on who is liable when an AI agent exceeds its mandate.

headline: Grayscale Highlights Ripple’s Elite Deals, but Why Won’t XRP’s Price Rally?
summary: Grayscale highlighted Ripple's elite partnerships, yet XRP stays flat. Here is why adoption is not lifting the price.

headline: Here’s How Much You Would Have Made Owning Mastercard Stock In The Last 15 Years
summary: Mastercard (NYSE:MA) has outperformed the market over the past 15 years by 8.79% on an annualized basis producing an average annual return of 20.95%. Currently, Mastercard has a market capitalization of $478.32 billion.

headline: Why pricey credit cards may soon cost more
summary: A settlement over swipe fees could mark a major shift for retail payments as merchants embrace surcharges on high-end cards.

headline: Berkshire Hathaway Sold Mastercard Stock. Should You Follow?
summary: Berkshire may have exited Mastercard for reasons unrelated to Mastercard's underlying business strength.
